name: Al Viola
abstract: Alfred Viola (June 16, 1919 – February 21, 2007) was an American jazz guitarist who worked with Frank Sinatra for 25 years. He played the mandolin on the soundtrack of the film The Godfather.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER mentions Al Viola as someone Frank Sinatra used, but INTERVIEWEE does not mention Al Viola in their response, only discussing the band's role and mentioning Sweets.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: Buddy and Al Viola and Al Aarons and Grover Mitchell and Leroy Vinnegar had a label together. He did our album covers for us.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: had pretty good subs, like, you know, Joe Pass, John Gray, Al Viola.
